attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT users.id, users.email, users.hashed_password, users.display_name, users.created_at, users.is_active 
FROM users 
WHERE users.id = $1::UUID /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-2588a6efba1629336771a67b943dcda8-1dd2ca5a67ea5949-03'*/

attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT tasks.id, tasks.project_id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.assignee_id, tasks.due_date, tasks.created_at, tasks.updated_at 
FROM tasks 
WHERE tasks.id = $1::UUID /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-2588a6efba1629336771a67b943dcda8-6cd592950d26637a-03'*/

attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT tasks_1.id AS tasks_1_id, tags.id AS tags_id, tags.name AS tags_name, tags.color AS tags_color 
FROM tasks AS tasks_1 JOIN task_tags AS task_tags_1 ON tasks_1.id = task_tags_1.task_id JOIN tags ON tags.id = task_tags_1.tag_id 
WHERE tasks_1.id IN ($1::UUID) /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-2588a6efba1629336771a67b943dcda8-ae366ad6885dd115-03'*/

attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT comments.task_id AS comments_task_id, comments.id AS comments_id, comments.author_id AS comments_author_id, comments.content AS comments_content, comments.created_at AS comments_created_at 
FROM comments 
WHERE comments.task_id IN ($1::UUID) ORDER BY comments.created_at /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-2588a6efba1629336771a67b943dcda8-5099e0ac3d5a5038-03'*/
